label: DinoX MQTT Bot
info:
Bidirectional communication with DinoX via MQTT.

Receives messages from dinox/chat and replies on dinox/response.

name: 🕐 Time
❓ Help
func:
msg.payload = '📖 DinoX Node-RED Bot

' +
    'Available commands:
' +
    '• time — Current date & time
' +
    '• ping — Pong!
' +
    '• joke — Random joke
' +
    '• help — This help
' +
    '• Anything else → Echo

' +
    '⛽ Fuel Prices (separate flow):
' +
    '• sprit / tanken / preise — All prices
' +
    '• e5 / e10 / diesel — Specific fuel
' +
    '• sprit reset — Reset price baseline';
return msg;

name: 🏓 Ping
😂 Joke
🔁 Echo
func:
msg.payload = '📨 You wrote: "' + msg.payload + '"\n\nTip: Type "help" for available commands.';
return msg;

name: ℹ️ DinoX ↔ Node-RED Flow
info:
## Setup

1. Double-click the MQTT nodes (📥 and 📤)
2. Configure broker (localhost:1883 or your MQTT broker)
3. Click Deploy
4. In DinoX bot chat type: help, time, ping, joke

## Topics
- dinox/chat → Node-RED receives
- dinox/response → DinoX receives

## Fuel Prices
Import the 'tankerkoenig_dinox.json' flow for fuel price monitoring.
Commands: sprit, e5, e10, diesel, sprit reset
